loading_hint: Module cu CDN in kan rak la. A rak tlung ti lo a si ahcun, na internet pehtlaihnak kha check.
hub.subtitle: Functional Behavior Assessment (FBA), ABC data ngahnak, le Behavior Intervention Plan (BIP) hmanthlannak hna.
hub.select_student_first: Thawk awkah a cunglei i sianginn fa pakhat thim

hub.overview_desc: Behavior lampi, graph hna, le tonghmuhnak statistic hna
hub.interval_desc: Partial, whole, asiloah momentary caan sampling grid
hub.token_desc: Reinforcement board mit i hmuhmi a, token cawlcanghthiammi he
hub.hotspot_desc: Nilei tuahsernak chungah behavior frequency a sangmi caan hmuhthlennak

hub.goals_desc: AI in chuahmi SMART behavior goal hna a, progress zohkhenhnak he
hub.contract_desc: AI in tialmi sianginn fa-saya behavior biakamnak

hub.reinforcer_desc: Phun 5 chungah reinforcer a ttha hna hmuhthlen
hub.choice_desc: Sianginn fa hmaiah thimnak card mit hmuhmi a, mahte i ngolnak ah aa hman
hub.audit_desc: Item 8 classroom environment checklist a, AI cohlannak he
hub.triangulation_desc: Data source 3+ kha aa kahkhin lo le aa rem ti hmuhnak ah cross-reference tuah
hub.impact_desc: Behavior frequency, duration, le kum khat tangka senh kha tahnak

hub.datasheet_desc: Tial khawh awkah frequency, duration, ABC, asiloah latency data sheet
hub.homenote_desc: AI in tialmi nu le pa biaknak a, aw thim khawhnak he
hub.fidelity_desc: AI in chuahmi nifate BIP implementation checklist (treatment adherence zohkhennak)
hub.feasibility_desc: Bia 5 contextual fit assessment a, AI cohlannak he
hub.gas_desc: Goal Attainment Scaling (GAS) a, AI in chuahmi descriptor he

hub.abagraph_desc: Publication-standard graph a, phase line, trend line, le mitin zohnak he
hub.abaguide_desc: Zawhnak khawh awk glossary, reinforcement schedule, decision tree le palhnak fawi tlangpi hna
hub.abaquiz_desc: Na ABA thiamnak kha tahnak — 80%+ ah competency badge na hmuh khawh
hub.antecedentmod_desc: Behavior a thawk hlanah huhrang awkah AI in cohlanhmi environmental thlennak hna
hub.bcbahandoff_desc: BCBA caah data dashboard + consultation caah tial khawh awk handoff packet
hub.biascheck_desc: Na data chungah lampi hna kha implicit bias kong i ngaihtuah awkah nemnem in chuahter — ttawmnak si lo, dingfehnak ca
hub.caseload_desc: Sianginn fa zapi tlangpi i zohnak — status, lampi, himhimnak harnak, le AI caseload tonghmuhnak
hub.casestudy_desc: AI in chuahmi case study hna a, phase 4 clinical ngaihtuahnak le tahnak he
hub.commlog_desc: Innchung biakdotnak hna pahnih lei i zohkhenhnak follow-up he — chungkhar pakhat zong khan in i tlauh khawh lo
hub.condprob_desc: ABC hypothesis hna kha data he tahmaih awkah foreground vs background probability hmuhnak
hub.consent_desc: Nu le pa he data lehrolhnak ca i hmankhawhmi consent ca — tial, tial chuah, JSON in pek khawh
hub.counseling_desc: Counseling tuahmaihnak ca AI sianginn fa persona he aa tonnak
hub.cultural_desc: Behavior kha cultural humility lens in tonghnga hlanah ngaihtuahnak bia 8 checklist
hub.cumrecord_desc: Skinner-style cumulative frequency graph hlun — ABA data tarhnak phunglam
hub.deescalate_desc: Thaw lannak, mit i hmuhmi caan thinhrian, sensory hahnak, le grounding — live nemternak
hub.drstrategy_desc: Differential reinforcement strategy a dik (DRA, DRI, DRO, DRL) thim
hub.dtt_desc: Discrete Trial Training (DTT) — trial khat lengmang ngahnak a, mastery criteria le auto-advance he
hub.effectsize_desc: Intervention ttha taknak tah awkah Tau-U, NAP, le PND ti khanh — phase tonghmuhnak he
hub.familyvoice_desc: Chungkhar nih hmuhnak, cultural ngaihtuahnak, le lawmhpinak chimchawnh awkah ca — AI lehnak he
hub.fbaworkflow_desc: FBA, BIP, le RTI behavior tier ca lampi-lampi guided workflow a, AI cawnpiaknak he
hub.fcttemplate_desc: Functional Communication Training (FCT) timhpiaknak a, modality thimnak he
hub.gamify_desc: Sianginn fa hmaiah lungput tracker a, streak, badge, quest, le ngaihtuahnak journal he
hub.glossary_desc: Zawhnak khawh awk ABA bia 25+ a, tlangmang in chimnak le vawleicung tahchunhnak he
hub.homelog_desc: Nu le pa nih hmankhawh hawi i nifate biafang in behavior ngahnak
hub.iepgoals_desc: AI in chuahmi present level, SMART goal, objective, accommodation, le progress monitoring plan hna
hub.iepprep_desc: AI in chuahmi pumhnak timhcia packet a, data tonghmuhnak, bia bichim, le voi 2 nak kal awk he
hub.intervention_desc: AI in chuahmi zarh tampi intervention plan a, tah khawhmi goal le milestone he
hub.ioacalc_desc: Inter-Observer Agreement (IOA) lampi 6 — point-by-point, interval, scored/unscored, exact count
hub.latency_desc: Stimulus-to-response caan tahnak a, mean, median, le range statistic he
hub.maintenance_desc: Mastery hnu skill tlangzamh le hmun, mi, le thilri chungah generalization zohkhenh
hub.mtss_desc: Multi-tiered support tlawm awkah mit i hmuhmi tier 3 pyramid a, AI cohlannak tier hmunh he
hub.nlabc_desc: Hmuhnak hna kha nifate biafang Anglo bia in tial asiloah paste tuah — AI nih ABC entry ah amah te in tah
hub.obscoach_desc: Na data ngahnak ttha tinak ah live coaching — voihtum hmuh, ttha deuh awkah cohlan, le na data tah
hub.pdpath_desc: ABA thiamnak lampi-lampi sak awkah guided onboarding module hna
hub.predict_desc: Behavior triggermi caan, hmun, le zianganh AI in tah — huhrang strategy he
hub.prefassess_desc: Reinforcer hmuhthlennak phunglam — MSWO, Paired Stimulus, le Free Operant protocol
hub.progressreport_desc: AI in chuahmi progress report a, data tonghmuhnak, lampi tahnak, goal progress, le nu le pa hmankhawh biafang option he
hub.qualitycheck_desc: Na ABC entry hna kha AI in zohnak a, ttha deuh awkah cohlannak he
hub.reframe_desc: Deficit-based chimnak hna kha AI nih asset-focused, thazaang-based biafang ah tial than
hub.reinforcement_desc: Reinforcer survey timhcia — sianginn fa pakhat lengmang zaadah a fornh ti phun 6 chungah hmuhthlen
hub.relmap_desc: Sianginn fa pehtlaihnak mit i hmuhmi diagram — zumhawk upadi, hawile, chungkhar, mentor — gap tahnak he
hub.replacebehavior_desc: Sual behavior hna kha functionally equivalent alternative behavior he kahkhin, cawnpiaknak strategy he
hub.restorative_desc: Nawhchimhnak remhnak, community circle, le i kal than pumhnak ca lampi-lampi script hna
hub.sandbox_desc: PD, pre-service training, asiloah ABA cawnnak ca simulated sianginn fa data la — sianginn fa taktak hman lo in
hub.scatterplot_desc: Caan-of-day × behavior grid a, caan lampi hmuhnak — ABC data in amah te in luh
hub.selfcheck_desc: Sianginn fa hmaiah lungput check-in le ngaihtuahnak journal — annih aw kha la
hub.sessionnotes_desc: Caan tialmi hmuhnak note a, aw in chimnak he — a cang lawngah context la
hub.sessiontracker_desc: Session-based behavior tahnak timhcia a, rate tahnak he
hub.snapshot_desc: Nu le pa-saya data lehrolhnak ca JSON snapshot lakchuah & lakluh
hub.socialvalidity_desc: Treatment cohlanhawkmi tahnak ca TARF le IRP-15 scale — publication caah a herh
hub.taskanalysis_desc: Skill kha cawn khawh awk lampi ah thlerh, forward, backward, asiloah total-task chaining le prompt zohkhenhnak he
hub.teamnotes_desc: Saya, para, counselor, le nu le pa caah role tampi caan tialmi i bawmnak thread
hub.treatintegrity_desc: Intervention hna kha timhcia bantukin implement an si maw ti tial — component-level treatment adherence zohkhenhnak
hub.trends_desc: Intensity lampi, setting frequency, le ni/caan heatmap langhtermi SVG graph hna
hub.bipgen_desc: Na data in Behavior Intervention Plan tial.
hub.cantdowontdo_desc: Skill vs. performance deficit kha thlen, bawmnak a dikmi thim awkah.
hub.competingpathways_desc: Duhmi le alternative behavior hna kha buainak lampi he kahkhin.
hub.mipractice_desc: Simulated sianginn fa lehnak he MI biaknak tuahmaih.
hub.practicum_desc: Guided practice case kha athawk in a donghnak tiang zohpi.
hub.replacementbehavior_desc: Sianginn fa nih a herhmi a thlennakmi same-function behavior hmuhthlen.
overview.empty_desc: Hi hmunah lampi hmuh awkah ABC data ngah thawk asiloah live hmuhnak tuah.
